listing_name: Duke On-Campus Apt, Modern & Cozy
description:
This modern and cozy condo is located right on Duke University Campus -- walking or cycling distance from 9th street, Whole Foods, the Nasher Museum, Duke's Center for the Arts, Duke's Medical Campus, Duke Undergraduate Admissions, and the hearts of both East and West Campus. A 21 minute/16-mile ride from RDU, the apartment's nestled between the Campus Police Station, a private kindergarten, and Duke Gardens. The neighbors are kind and respectful and there's always plenty of off-street parking!

The space
Welcome to our listing! My partner Sam and I are Duke alum who stay in this space part-time and absolutely love it, as well as the area. It's an incredibly safe and quiet neighborhood. We think it will be easy to make yourself at home no matter what your plans are! :)

About the apartment:
The apartment is located on the ground floor of a quadplex on Duke's campus. You’ll have your own entrance and key.

When you step inside, you’ll enter a living room equipped with a large desk big enough for two and a small home gym (with mirrors, weights, foam flooring, etc).

The dining room and kitchen, equipped with basics for cooking, are off to the side of the living room.

Down the hallway, you’ll find the bedroom. It features a king Casper mattress, reading lamps, and a window that allows for natural light. The laundry closet with a washer and dryer can be found here as well as access to the bathroom. If you need to do laundry during your stay, we’ve got you covered: we provide laundry detergent! The bathroom will include freshly laundered towels however since COVID we've *stopped* providing shampoo and conditioner.

The inside of the apartment is quite basic and cozy. The walls are white. There's carpet in the living room and bedroom. The living room is subdivided into a little yoga studio with gym foam flooring and mirrors. There's a large desk big enough for two in the living room and some ottoman seating. The kitchen and bathroom have vinyl flooring. You enter the kitchen by passing through the living room and you enter the bedroom by passing through the kitchen. The bathroom is attached to the bedroom in the back of the apartment. The bedroom has two large closets -- one of which houses the washer and dryer. There's a vanity, some drawers, and a big mirror. The bathroom has a shower and a bathtub, a toilet, a sink, all the basic things, of course. The kitchen has an oven, stovetop, microwave, a toaster oven, a Keurig, a toaster, a refrigerator, a sink, cooking utensils, etc. Again, all the basics. It's quite clean and plain!

As far as check-in, there's usually a key in a lockbox at the door so you can check yourself in if that's your preference. You'll keep the key with you during your time and just either put it back in the lockbox when you leave. Sam and I could also meet you at the apartment to let you in if that's your preference.

Guest access
Guests have access to all spaces, and have the apartment to themselves!

Other things to note
Alright. Let's see. From the airport, the apartment's about 16.4 miles away which translates to a 21-minute drive/ a $15 - $22 Uber. That can heavily depend on traffic, however. But at its worst, I can't imagine the drive would be any more than 35 minutes. There's a viewing deck at the airport that I like to visit often so I make the drive quite a bit! :)

There's also a route that can be entirely done via bus, but that's even confusing for locals so I don't really recommend it.

As far as campus goes, the apartment's directly on what's considered to be Duke University's West Campus and it's serviced by the campus bus routes. The walk to Cameron Indoor from the apartment is quite lovely -- especially if you go through Duke Gardens. Googl maps app is saying the walk takes about 25 minutes at most. Undergrad Admissions is a 10-minute walk from the apartment for those prospective students checking out Duke.

The C1 bus comes every 7 minutes and it's free of charge. If you were to take the bus to Cameron Indoor, that route would look something like:
- walk 5 minutes to the bus stop by the Nasher Museum,
- take the 5-minute C1 to West Campus, and then
- walk 5 minutes to the stadium.

listing_name: Quiet 2BR Near Duke & VA Hospitals | Parking
description:
Beautifully remodeled 2-bedroom home in the Walltown area of Durham, NC, just 1.5 miles from Duke University Hospital and the Durham VA Medical Center. Designed with professionals in mind, the home features a spa-style bathroom with waterfall shower and a fully updated kitchen with new appliances. Quiet and comfortable, ideal for medical professionals or longer stays, with in-unit washer & dryer and free parking.

The space
Enter into a comfortable living room with an open-style kitchen just to the left. The space is thoughtfully designed, and you may almost miss the gas fireplace, which adds warmth and character to the living area.

The home offers two private bedrooms, each with built-in closets, and a beautifully updated bathroom featuring a waterfall shower with multiple shower heads. In addition, there is a dedicated office ideal for remote work, as well as a separate workout room. The in-unit washer and dryer are conveniently located in the workout room closet.

The home is approximately 950–1,000 sq ft, with 10-foot ceilings, crown molding, and neutral finishes throughout, creating a quiet, comfortable environment well suited for professional or extended stays.

Guest access
Guests enjoy private, keyless entry with a secure smart lock for easy self check-in and check-out. You will have exclusive access to the entire main house, including the office, workout room, and laundry area.

A separate rear deck and grill, located behind the home and attached to a detached shed, are available for guest use and are shared with the separate in-law suite. Parking is free and easily accessible, allowing for a smooth arrival at any time.

Other things to note
This listing is for the main house only. A separate in-law suite is located at the rear of the property and is not included with this rental. The in-law suite has its own entrance and is a completely separate Airbnb listing, ensuring privacy for all guests.

description:
Adorable dog friendly cottage in the heart of Walltown, one of the classic neighborhoods that drive Durham's popularity. One block from Duke East Campus, three blocks from the bars and cafes of 9th street, & a short Uber or Lyft to downtown or Duke hospital. The small cottage is full of charm and character with open kitchen and living area with granite counters, tiled kitchen and bath, and back screened porch. It offers Central heat and air, dishwasher, washer/dryer.

The space
New Note 06/07/2021: Starting on this date a pet fee of $100 dollars per dog will be charged. We love furrrrr babies but they do extend the cleaning process. After a wonderful puppy stays in our home, we sanitize it with steam on soft surfaces, Clorox and Pine-sol for those guests without pets. This extends the cleaning service past a normal cleaning. As we pay our cleaning crew a living wage of $25 dollars an hour, the pet fee pays for this cleaning extension. Since Airbnb does not make this charge simple please be patient with us as we figure out the best way to add this charge without taking away instant booking. thank you

The kitchen offers a complimentary coffee and tea bar along with oatmeal and breakfast bars. If you like to cook, the cottage offers a fully stocked kitchen, filtered water pitcher (even though Durham water was just voted Best Tasting!), and complimentary cooking oils, vinegar, salt & pepper, as well as plenty of cabinet space to store all your groceries. Prefer to eat out? Durham is known for its great restaurants near the cottage.

At night you will enjoy a Nectar mattress(rated 2nd best by consumer reports) for the king bed and ceiling fans in every bedroom and living area. You will find additional fan, heater, blankets and a white noise machine in bedroom closets to make sure you are as comfortable as possible.

Wifi and TV with Chromecast are available, but NO cable/satelite. A small workspace is available in the twin bedroom.

Need something not in the cottage? Send a request and we will try to accommodate if at all possible.

entire home

description:
PARTY POLICY: Any violations of our house rules such as: Excessive Noise, Smoking, Extra Guests, After-hours pool, hallway loitering, large gatherings, and camera tampering will lead to a fine of $300, cancellation of your reservation and your removal from the property. On-site security and city police have permission to enter the rental if house rules are violated.

If this is a nonissue, please send an inquiry or instant book. We would love to host you!

The space
The Trifecta on Morgan Street is a charming 2 bedroom, 2 bath rental in the historical Warehouse District of Downtown Durham that includes a fully stocked kitchen, comfortably furnished rooms, and free parking on-site. It's within walking distance to the convention center and Downtown Durham's best restaurants, pubs, and entertainment.

You'll love the 18th century architectural roots of the space which features brick, timber, high ceilings, wood floors & an open floor plan. It'll be your home away from home while you explore and experience everything Durham has to offer. We love to give recommendations to our guests so never hesitate to ask us for things to do, places to eat, or sights to see.

What you'll really like about staying at our space:

• Cleanliness. Our space is professionally cleaned before each and every reservation, while many other listings in the city are not. You'll really appreciate staying at a clean and well taken care of space.

• Communication. We have a 100% response rate for a reason. We respond to each and every guest message within just a few minutes, before and during your stay.

• Arrival. We have a convenient 24/7 self-check-in system with free on-site parking that lets our guests have flexible check-in times, no matter how late it is at night.

• Safety. Our townhome is located in an apartment community that has security cameras, is well-lit, and has an enclosed garage for private parking. We also have an outside camera above the hallway entrance that we use to help us conveniently check-in guests, and as an added security benefit for our guests. These cameras do have audio recording that we are able to review history of if needed. There are no cameras or audio recording devices inside.

• Location. The location we're in is a walker's paradise since most places you'll want to visit won't require a car. Morgan Street is as flat as a pancake, has ample sidewalk space, and is very bikeable. Our home is just a 5-minute walk away from the Convention Center. Walk Score is 84, Transit Score 65 and Bike Score 80.

Everything you need to know about our home:

• two spacious bedrooms each with a queen-sized bed
• Apple TV (must use your own personal subscription for apps) and cable in the living room
• super fast wifi, perfect for apple tv streaming
• floral photo wall with instagrammable neon sign

Please take a look at the photos in the listing to see our home and feel free to message us with any questions you may have regarding our rental. We typically respond in a few minutes.

*Important Note: This rental is located in a historic tobacco warehouse that has been converted into residential apartments but still maintains older warehouse fixtures. The walls for the bedrooms do not reach the 22 foot ceiling, this can be seen in the pictures. Also, since this is an industrial setting, some noise does carry from surrounding neighbors. The parking is not on the ground level of the building, but rather 1 block away. Let us know if you have any further questions about these notes!

listing_name: Quietly-designed flat, EV-ready, your Durham base
description:
A quietly-designed second-floor flat for people who need Durham to be a base — with a NEMA 14-50 outlet at the curb for your EV, a walk-in waterfall shower, and a kitchen built for actually cooking.

Two bedrooms (one comfortable queen each), one bath, fast wifi, a dedicated workspace, a real pour-over coffee setup, off-street parking, a short walk to downtown, minutes from Duke.

Smart-lock check-in any hour. Best for a couple, two friends, or a working traveler. Many guests return.

The space
The upstairs of a 1915 simplified Queen Anne, taken to the studs and put back together — the original floors and proportions kept, the windows and mechanical systems brought up to date. We renovated it the way we'd want to live in it.

What you can walk to:
• Cocoa Cinnamon Old North (the Little Waves coffee café) — 8 min
• Motorco Music Hall and Fullsteam Brewery — 7 min
• Geer Street Garden — 8 min
• Durham Farmers Market — 10 min
• Durham Convention Center — 13 min
• DPAC — 20 min on foot, 5 by car

It's the closest residential block to downtown, but it's still residential — trees, songbirds, easy street parking.

About the coffee: we keep the kitchen stocked with beans from Little Waves Coffee Roasters — the Durham micro-roastery named Roast Magazine's Micro Roaster of the Year in 2022 and a 2026 Good Food Awards finalist. Their café (Cocoa Cinnamon Old North) is the 8-minute walk above.

About the EV outlet: the plug on the side of the house is a real NEMA 14-50, not a wall outlet you'll trip a breaker on. Bring your own charging cable.

How the building works: the kitchen — your only common space — sits directly above the downstairs bedroom. It's perfect for cooking, working, or sharing a meal, but it's not built for late-night gatherings. If you're a light sleeper, the front bedroom is the quieter pick.

Honest about what the space provides and does not provide: no separate living room, no bathtub, one flight of stairs to the entry.

The Space:
You'll come in through a private side entrance with a staircase off the driveway — your own door, not shared with the downstairs unit.

Upstairs is laid out as two bedrooms off a central hall, one bathroom, a kitchen with dining table.

Both bedrooms are sized for two adults and have real closets. Multiple windows with blackout shades in each room mean natural light all day and good cross-ventilation in spring and fall. Parking is off-street, and free on-street directly next to the house.

The Neighborhood:
Cleveland-Holloway is a historic neighborhood at the eastern edge of downtown Durham — late-19th- and early-20th-century homes, mature trees, and a community-garden vibe. The block itself is residential and quiet after dark; the downtown energy is three or four blocks west, so you walk to it rather than live in it.

The food-and-music corridor along Foster, Geer, and Rigsbee streets is where most of the walkable Durham experience happens — restaurants, breweries, cafés, and the Farmers Market (Saturdays year-round, Wednesdays April through October).

For groceries, the nearest walkable option is Bulldega Urban Market on Parrish Street — about 12 minutes on foot, locally-owned, with fresh produce, meat, prepared meals, and beer and wine, open until 9 most nights. For a full Whole Foods or Harris Teeter run, it's a 6-minute drive to the Broad Street location.

A short drive (not walkable):
• Duke East Campus — 5 min
• Duke University Hospital — 9 min
• RDU Airport — 25 min

Guest access
The guests have access to the second-floor space of the house.

Other things to note
Quick answers to questions we get a lot:

• Check-in / check-out. Standard check-in is 3pm, checkout 11am. Smart-lock self check-in any hour.

• Parking. One off-street space directly next to the house fits a standard car or SUV. Easy free street parking if you need a second spot, or if the driveway is occupied by a downstairs guest.

• TV. One TV, in the back bedroom

• Packages. Yes — Amazon, FedEx, UPS all deliver to the side door without issue.

Things worth knowing before you book:

• If you have very small children, this isn't the right unit — no bathtub, stairs without a gate, no child-safety equipment.

• We're pet-free. Service animals welcome with a heads-up before arrival.

Booking Requirement: Guests must have at least 3 reviews on their profile.

The space
The Trifecta on Morgan Street is a tastefully furnished 2 bedroom home in the trendy and historical Warehouse District of Downtown Durham. Conveniently located for travelers visiting for vacation or work and has everything you'll need to enjoy your stay!

You'll love our guest amenities. In addition to free parking, you can enjoy the sparkling pool (usual season is May - September), fitness gym, and great location within Durham.

Our home is on people’s minds. Save us to a wishlist!

The Trifecta on Morgan Street is a charming 2 bedroom, 2 bath rental in the historical Warehouse District of Downtown Durham that includes a fully stocked kitchen, comfortably furnished rooms, and free parking on-site. It's within walking distance to the convention center and Downtown Durham's best restaurants, pubs, and entertainment.

You'll love the 18th century architectural roots of the space which features brick, timber, high ceilings, wood floors & an open floor plan. It'll be your home away from home while you explore and experience everything Durham has to offer. We love to give recommendations to our guests so never hesitate to ask us for things to do, places to eat, or sights to see.

What you'll really like about staying at our space:

• Cleanliness. Our space is professionally cleaned before each and every reservation, while many other listings in the city are not. You'll really appreciate staying at a clean and well taken care of space.

• Communication. We have a 100% response rate for a reason. We respond to each and every guest message within just a few minutes, before and during your stay.

• Arrival. We have a convenient 24/7 self-check-in system with free on-site parking that lets our guests have flexible check-in times, no matter how late it is at night.

• Safety. Our townhome is located in an apartment community that has security cameras, is well-lit, and has an enclosed garage for private parking. We also have an outside camera above the hallway entrance and outdoor patio that we use to help us conveniently check-in guests, and as an added security benefit for our guests. These cameras do have audio recording that we are able to review history of if needed. There are no cameras or audio recording devices inside.

• Location. The location we're in is a walker's paradise since most places you'll want to visit won't require a car. Morgan Street is as flat as a pancake, has ample sidewalk space, and is very bikeable. Our home is just a 5-minute walk away from the Convention Center. Walk Score is 84, Transit Score 65 and Bike Score 80.

Everything you need to know about our home:

• two spacious bedrooms each with a queen-sized bed
• Large 36 foot private balcony with 2 hammocks, table & string lights
• Apple TV (must use personal subscription for apps) and tv antenna in the living room
• super fast wifi, perfect for apple tv streaming
• two full bathrooms
• walk-in closet that'll hold all your suitcases, travel bags, and clothing
• paid washer and dryer down the hallway (not in our unit)
• black-out curtains over the large windows
• fully stocked kitchen with the essential cookware, silverware, and dinnerware you'll need to dine-in
• dining table
• spacious living room that includes a queen-sized pull out sofa
• laptop friendly workspace

Please take a look at the photos in the listing to see our home and feel free to message us with any questions you may have regarding our rental. We typically respond in a few minutes.

*Important Note: This rental is located in a historic tobacco warehouse that has been converted into residential apartments but still maintains older warehouse fixtures. The walls for the bedrooms do not reach the 22 foot ceiling, this can be seen in the pictures. Also, since this is an industrial setting, some noise does carry from surrounding neighbors. The parking is not on the ground level of the building, but rather 1 block away. Let us know if you have any further questions about these notes!

description:
Cute little one bed room located in trendy Lakewood/Lyon Park. Minutes from Duke!

The unit is newly renovated, brand new granite kitchen counter tops, new tiled bath room, hard wood floors, new furniture, comfortable memory foam mattress, new plumbing, electrical, mini split air conditioning/heat, fiber speed WIFI, smart TV, off street parking for two cars in driveway.

The space
This space is the left side of a duplex separated by a center wall and accessed via a private entrance. The entire space is yours and no interior spaces are shared.

Once inside, the property opens to a living room with a couch, coffee table and smart tv where you can access your streaming services. The living room is open to the kitchen with barstool seating for two, new stainless steel appliances and basic pots, pans, cutlery, etc.

Down the hallway, you will find the laundry area equipped with a washing machine and dryer and a bathroom with a full sized tub/shower combo.

The bedroom has a closet space and comfortable queen bed and privacy blackout curtains for a comfortable night's sleep.

Guest access
Please park in the driveway to the left. Please enter the first time up the front steps and use the door on the left (unit A). A secondary door is located off the side of the property for easy access to the driveway if you are carrying items but we only provide exterior access to the front door. **If you open the side door, please ensure it is locked each time when leaving.

The door uses the August Home smart lock and can be accessed by sending us your cellphone information prior to check in. Once you provide your cellphone and we add your number, you will receive a text message with additional instructions on how to download the app. Upon arrival to the front door, simply open the August Home app and press the circle to unlock the front door (the phone will sense the door lock via Bluetooth). We will also send you a unique pin pad code either as a backup or for primary use if you prefer not to download the door lock app.

In the event that technology fails, we have a backup lockbox hidden on site for emergency access.

Please note there are steps up the front porch to enter the house. Once inside, everything is on a single level. There are security cameras on the outside corners and front porch.

- We are pet friendly BUT all of our guests do not have pets or appreciate pet hair. Therefore, we charge an extra $57 pet cleaning fee that is passed on entirely to our cleaning crew. description:

Note: 60 day minimum stay. There is no access to the kitchen or laundry areas in the main house. The room is secluded and is functionally a private studio. Guests must have positive reviews before being approved.

The space
Our property is the end unit within a small townhome complex at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac. The neighborhood is a quiet community easily accessible to nearby highways and I-40/I-85, as well as Research Triangle Park (RTP), Durham/Duke University, and Chapel Hill/UNC.

RTP: 8 min
Downtown Durham: 9 min
Duke Hospital/University: 12 min
Raleigh-Durham International Airport: 14 min
UNC/Chapel Hill: 17-20 min

Guests have exclusive access to the driveway so that you can park as close as possible to the home. While in our unit, you will be the only person using the driveway.

There are no shared spaces within the townhouse. Your hosts are busy medical professionals who work long hours at a nearby hospital, so you will often be the only occupant in the home. This experience is designed to maximize your privacy; however, as needed, we will be available to help in any way or address concerns regarding your stay.

Other things to note

We personally recommend the following laundromat for basic laundry needs. It is a 6 min drive from the Airbnb:

The Wash House
Address: 3700 Fayetteville St, Durham, NC 27707

Note that access to the unit is from the back patio which requires walking around the side of the townhome to the back patio. Motion-sensor lights are activated at night along the side of the home so you can see.

Guests applying for the space must have prior positive reviews through AirBnB. No first-time AirBnB users or those with negative reviews will be approved.

listing_name: 1949 Spartan Aircraft Cottage w/AC - Durham, NC
description:
This 1949 Spartan Aircraft Trailer is a post-war slice of Americana. There’s just a feeling of connecting to the simpler things in life, and a connection to an era gone by. Detail and quality were at the forefront of manufacturing in the USA during this time at the dawn of the 50’s. It’s a surviving trailer, 80% original. Some modern upgrades and updating have been done but you are very much stepping straight into the past when you enter this Spartan and it’s rural residential surroundings.

The space
Individual use enclosed locking Toilet and Shower Facilities are outdoors, in shared spaces. The common area also includes a Fire Pit, Picnic Tables, Gas Grill, and Laundry Room. The Back Yard setting has strung lighting above and walking paths. The camper itself has running water at the kitchen sink. Please remember you’re camping. the camper is equipped with a dual hot plate, Convection Oven, and small Refrigerator. Some closets and cabinets are empty for guest to use. We are working on restoring this survivor in between guests so it’s not perfect yet, but already has great vibes :-)

Guest access
Parking is off street on a private drive that leads to the campers.

Other things to note
I’m sorry to have to announce this, but no animals can be in this space. I am very allergic to cats and dogs. I’ve had years of extensive allergy shots and been allergic my whole life with swelling eyes, sinus infections and shortness of breath due to spaces where animals have been. Thank you in advance for understanding and respecting my condition. I love animals despite not being able to enjoy them fully.

listing_name: Eco-Urban Tiny House near Downtown and Duke
description:
Our Tiny House is a haven, a simple retreat from the rush of daily living, and has been mindfully constructed with eco-friendly, recycled, and sustainable materials. Nestled in a corner of our backyard among old oaks and pines, it feels far from Downtown Durham even though you're only 1.5 miles away (walkable on a greenway).

listing_name: Comfy bungalow (2 BR, 1BA) for any travel need
description:
This 1950 bungalow is a spacious, peaceful and comfortable place to stay for any travel need. It has two workstations, high-speed wifi, 4K TV, and a well-equipped kitchen with new appliances. The backyard is large with a grill and seating area overlooking oak trees. The bungalow is located right next to Northgate Park, with dog parks, tennis courts, picnic area and walking trails. Downtown, Duke University, Duke Medical Center and Duke Hospital are just a short bike ride away.

The space
The bungalow is spacious and located in a very peaceful neighboorhood. You have very easy access to the park and all the surrounding recreational areas. For instance, the Museum of Life and Sciences is only a 10 minute walk away making it perfect for families or just a break after a long day of work.

The bedrooms come with one queen-size and one full size bed. Two people can easily sleep in the queen size bed. We can provide an additionalbed if there is a need. Each bedroom has black out cellular shades. We have mosquito nets on all the windows so you can sleep with it open if you so choose.

You can use the 50’’ 4K TV setup in the living room to use any of the major streaming services. We have set it up so that you can use your own credentials and choose a date for when those will be wiped. It will prompt you for that date when you start it for the first time. It also supports AirPlay if you wish to cast content to it. We have two Bose Bluetooth speakers for you to use - one in the living room and another one in the bedroom with the full-size bed.

We have two separate workstations prepped with sitting/standing desks. One of the desks is in one of the bedrooms and the other one is in the living room. We also have had guests use the dining room table in the living room as a make-shift workstation, as it has very comfortable chairs. Our guests are welcomed to use the wifi printer located in one of the bed rooms.

The kitchen has new appliances and is fully equipped with anything necessary to cook a full normal meal. You are welcome to use any non-perishables and spices in the kitchen. We prefer if you compost any of the compostable material and would be happy to provide some instructions for how to best do so. We are avid composters and use the resulting soil for all our garden needs.

We do allow our guests to use the washer and dryer within reason. When the weather allows, you can also just dry your clothes on the line dryer right next to the patio.

The patio in the back and backyard is perfect to relax in after a long day at work or day activities. You are welcome to use the grill, but make sure to clean it properly after you use it. There are a lot of birds and we often have the hummingbird feeders up. They will feed at dawn and dusk making it a very relaxing time during the summers.

All framed photos in the bungalow are taken by the hosts from different parts of the world.

Guest access
You can park two large cars on the left side of the driveway. Do not park on the right side as it is a shared driveway with the neighbors. It is preferable to back into the driveway as it can be a bit tricky to back out from it. We do not recommend parking on the street even if it is allowed.

You have easy access to a lot of biking trails. For instance, the head of the American Tobacco trail is only 10-15 minutes away making it a great activity for a weekend day yet there are several other trails close by for shorter bike rides. We can provide you with a couple of bikes and helmets if you would need to. There are several running trails as well through Northgate Park.

The Northgate Park with a rich set of recreational areas is right across from the bungalow. For instance, the playground is only 1-2 minutes away from the house and the tennis courts are literally across the street. We have a couple of spare rackets in one of the bedrooms which you are welcome to use. People are also using the courts to play some paddle ball.

The bungalow is located close to the freeway entry making it very easy for you to go on longer day or weekend trips to explore the area. You can reach either Lake Jordan and Falls Lake in only 20-30 minutes by car.

You'll love our guest amenities. In addition to free parking, you can enjoy the sparkling pool (usual season is May - September)), fitness gym, and great location within Durham.

Our home is on people’s minds. Save us to a wishlist!

The Trifecta on Morgan Street is a charming 2 bedroom, 2 bath rental in the historical Warehouse District of Downtown Durham that includes a fully stocked kitchen, comfortably furnished rooms, and free parking on-site. It's within walking distance to the convention center and Downtown Durham's best restaurants, pubs, and entertainment.

You'll love the 18th century architectural roots of the space which features brick, timber, high ceilings, wood floors & an open floor plan. It'll be your home away from home while you explore and experience everything Durham has to offer. We love to give recommendations to our guests so never hesitate to ask us for things to do, places to eat, or sights to see.

What you'll really like about staying at our space:

• Cleanliness. Our space is professionally cleaned before each and every reservation, while many other listings in the city are not. You'll really appreciate staying at a clean and well taken care of space.

• Communication. We have a 100% response rate for a reason. We respond to each and every guest message within just a few minutes, before and during your stay.

• Arrival. We have a convenient 24/7 self-check-in system with free on-site parking that lets our guests have flexible check-in times, no matter how late it is at night.

• Safety. Our townhome is located in an apartment community that has security cameras, is well-lit, and has an enclosed garage for private parking. We also have an outside camera above the hallway entrance and outdoor patio that we use to help us conveniently check-in guests, and as an added security benefit for our guests. These cameras do have audio recording that we are able to review history of if needed. There are no cameras or audio recording devices inside.

• Location. The location we're in is a walker's paradise since most places you'll want to visit won't require a car. Morgan Street is as flat as a pancake, has ample sidewalk space, and is very bikeable. Our home is just a 5-minute walk away from the Convention Center. Walk Score is 84, Transit Score 65 and Bike Score 80.

Everything you need to know about our home:

• two spacious bedrooms each with a queen-sized bed
• Large 36 foot private balcony with 2 hammocks, table & string lights
• Apple TV (must use your own subscription for apps) and tv antenna in the living room
• super fast wifi, perfect for apple tv streaming
• two full bathrooms
• walk-in closet that'll hold all your suitcases, travel bags, and clothing
• paid washer and dryer down the hallway (not in our unit)
• black-out curtains over the large windows
• fully stocked kitchen with the essential cookware, silverware, and dinnerware you'll need to dine-in
• dining table
• spacious living room that includes a queen-sized pull out sofa
• laptop friendly workspace

Please take a look at the photos in the listing to see our home and feel free to message us with any questions you may have regarding our rental. We typically respond in a few minutes.

*Important Note: This rental is located in a historic tobacco warehouse that has been converted into residential apartments but still maintains older warehouse fixtures. The walls for the bedrooms do not reach the 22 foot ceiling, this can be seen in the pictures. Also, since this is an industrial setting, some noise does carry from surrounding neighbors. The parking is not on the ground level of the building, but rather 1 block away. Let us know if you have any further questions about these notes!

*Important Note. We require a photo of our guests' driver's license/state id during their stay. Please do not inquire or instant book if you cannot provide a photo of your driver's license/state id. listing_name: Large 4BR Historic Home near Downtown & Duke
description:
Discover historic charm and modern comfort at our spacious 4-bedroom, 3-bath retreat. Nestled near Downtown and Duke University, this 1930s gem offers a unique blend of 'old Durham' character and contemporary amenities.

Relish morning serenity on the expansive front porch or opt for coziness on the back porch. With 4 generously sized bedrooms and 2 spacious living rooms, there's abundant space to unwind.

The space
The vintage allure of this home adds a touch of timeless elegance to your stay.

Ideal for both business travelers seeking ample accommodations and families exploring the area, our home boasts 4 bedrooms, including a convenient downstairs option, ensuring everyone's comfort. Gather in the dining room for shared meals and create lasting memories in the inviting living spaces.

Moreover, The Cookery wedding venue is merely a 2-minute stroll away, making it an excellent choice for wedding attendees. Say goodbye to booking multiple rooms – our residence provides ample space for all, eliminating the need for fragmented arrangements.

Experience the best of Durham's history and contemporary convenience in one remarkable stay. Book now and relish a truly memorable visit!

Guest access
Downtown Durham is walkable(Durham Bulls stadium, DPAC, Tobacco District) in about 15 minutes. Bike ride is 5. Uber in 2.

3 parking spaces are the back and can hold 6 cars total comfortably before having to park on the street.

Other things to note
This is the perfect home for a family stay or just a girls trip destination if you want to spend a weekend in Downtown Durham. Perfect place to stay for the weekend when enjoying a show at the DPAC.

We get a lot of questions asking if one of the bedrooms is downstairs. There is a bedroom and full bath downstairs with a queen bed.

listing_name: Spacious Home Easy Access to RTP, RDU & Raleigh
description:
We’d love to welcome you to our unique home, offering a farmhouse experience perfect for getaways, family celebrations, or business retreats. Located in the center of the RDU area, you’re just 1–5 miles from the airport, TriGolf, Topgolf, shopping, dining, and minutes from Raleigh, RTP, and Morrisville.

Enjoy plenty of space for bonding and relaxation. A peaceful escape with unbeatable convenience!

The space
Create your picture perfect in our farm home! We are excited to share our home from time to time with other families for a quick weekend get-away, or short-stay exploring the Raleigh-Durham area. Experience the rural farmhouse feel, in the middle of RDU area, while being close to everything. Enjoy our gourmet kitchen with double-oven stove and 20 spices for your use. We are 5 miles away from RDU airport and within 2 miles of everything else (movies, groceries, shopping, recreation, and variety of dining options). The neighborhood is quiet, stone-throw away from Raleigh’s Brier Creek area, and in one of the safest areas in Durham. Guess will have access to the whole house.

Our home is also just a mile away from Trigolf, a pretty good driving range and about 6 miles away from Topgolf, which is a great place to have fun, whether you're an avid golfer or just looking for a unique outing with friends and family.

Event Hosting Policy:
We welcome various events at our Airbnb property, including bridal or baby showers, business meetings, retreats, and friends and family reunions. For gatherings with additional attendees beyond the house guests, the following fees apply:
Up to 25 extra people: A fee of $500.
Up to 40 extra people: A fee of $1,500.
$125 Additional Cleaning Fee
$500 Security Deposit

The event fee is non-refundable and due when you book the property for either of the packages. The event fee does not cover the cost of booking the property (which is required to book either package). We will collect the event fee from you after the booking is completed. If you have any questions just let us know!

Please note that we prioritize our neighbors’ tranquility. As a result, we kindly request that there be no outside DJ music. Additionally, we ask that all outdoor noise concludes by 10:00 PM.

Thank you for choosing our property for your special occasions! 🌟🏡

Entry: You will have your own passcode for front door access. Keyless entry codes are time-activated and programmed to start at 4:00 PM. Your code will not unlock the door before 4:00 PM.

Living Room: Comfortable couch - a sofa bed that can turn into a queen bed while watching your favorite shows/movies from our big 65 inch screen 4K smart TV.

Dining Room: Great area to work, savor coffee, or enjoy a good meal

Kitchen: Fully equipped Kitchen with stainless farmhouse sink, a big kitchen island, with full collection of a variety of spices as well as kitchen gadgets including toaster, griddle, and coffee maker.

Bedrooms 1: A spacious bedroom furnished with 2 queen bed with 4 pillows per bed, a desk, with attached full bathroom.

Bedrooms 2: A spacious bedroom furnished with a queen bed with 4 pillows, , a desk, LG smart TV with built in Roku, and a twin sofa bed.

Bedrooms 3: A spacious bedroom furnished with a queen bed with 4 pillows, 2 desks, chairs, with attached huge full bathroom with a garden tub and walk-in shower.

Bedroom 4: Furnished with a full sized bed with desk and chair

Bedroom 5: Enjoy this space while entertaining or playing billiard, or just chill at the convertible twin sofa bed overlooking the backyard and pond area.

Bathroom 1: Beautifully finished huge bathroom, with garden tub, wide-entrance walk-in shower, toilet with LUXE self-cleaning bidet, and updated lavatories. Hair dryer is provided.

Bathroom 2: Walk-in shower and updated toilet with LUXE self-cleaning bidet and updated lavatories.

Bathroom 3 - Attached to the back of Bedroom 3; Walk in showers, toilet and lavatory; ceiling exhaust fan with speaker and bluetooth wireless technology; this bathroom is also accessible through an entrance door from the backyard.

Laundry: Bosch washer and dryer

Parking Area: Spacious private parking area in front of the house can accommodate up to 10 cars.

Must be 25 Years old to rent.

NO GUESTS other than the guests on the reservation. Entertaining guests will be considered an event with a charge of $100 per hour for guests up to 15 people for day time guests. Subject to host approval.

Backyard: With a 100-year-old, oak tree with a swing attached to it, Swing may not be able to carry over 200 lbs weight. Fully –fenced space, overlooking an acre pond. No swimming in the pond; Please let us now if you would like to experience feeding the fish, and we can leave some feeds for you to give them. Catch-and -release fishing allowed. We have a fire pit with wood stump chairs around it. Perfect for smores!

Guest access
Spacious parking area in front that can accommodate 10 cars.

We allow catch-and release fishing only. We don’t provide fishing rods. Please bring your own if you would like tio fish.

Please bring firewood and fire starters if you wish to use the fire pit.

Other things to note
Nestled in a serene neighborhood, our property offers a peaceful retreat. However, please note that it is adjacent to a busy two-lane road. While inside, you’ll enjoy tranquility, but you may hear some traffic noise, especially when the doors are open.

Pet Fee - $75/night per pet; Non-Refundable.
With extra $250 additional cleaning fee, if there is excessive fur, damage to furniture and pet poop on lawn.

Important Notice:
- Use of the backyard swing is at your own risk. We are not responsible or liable for any injuries that may occur.
- Exploring the woods and pond area is also at your own risk. We are not responsible or liable for any injuries that may occur.

Please note: We provide basic starter amenities (toilet paper, paper towels, coffee pods, creamers, sugar, etc.) There are nearby stores about 2 miles if you need more than what is initially provided.
Please don't use the towels to remove makeup, or as cleaning rags for the floor/shoes.


Additional Services Available:
Early Check-In: Check in at 1:00 PM (standard check-in time is 4:00 PM) for an additional fee of $40.
Late Check-Out - Check out at 1:30 PM (standard check-out is 11:00 AM) for an additional fee of $40.

ALL guests must be on the reservation, including children. The rate is automatically calculated once you enter in the correct guest count on your reservation. Unauthorized guests not noted in advance on the reservation will be charged a $20 fee per person, per day. No visitors on the property (front yard, back yard, side yard, in the house) without prior approval from host.

Please let us know prior to arrival if you would like to use the gas grill. For a small additional fee of $45, you can sizzle up your favorite dishes while taking in the fresh air!

NO UNAPPROVED PARTIES OR EVENTS ARE TO BE HELD ON THIS PROPERTY WITHOUT PERMISSION. If any such event is conducted, these actions will be taken: 1) The event will be shut down immediately, and a police report written. 2) Guest will be charge an EVENT FEE in the amount of $100 per hour that the event was held. 3) Guest will incur extra cleaning fees and supply costs. 4) Host will disclose this breech, and disregard of house rules in their review. Permits are supposed to be pulled for events like this, so the Host could incur fines and penalties. Entertaining guests other than the people on the reservation is considered as an event fellowship and will incur charges of $100 per hour, and will require prior approval from the host.

Before you leave, please:
• If you have time, please place used bed linens and used towels in the laundry area
• Collect all garbage and place in trash bin outside (exit through the door near the laundry area)
• Turn off the lights and lock the door.

listing_name: Duke Thornapple 2BR | AT&T Fiber
description:
Located in between Downtown Durham, RTP and Southpoint. Near: Duke University/Hospital, UNC. Updated with modern kitchen, appliances, high quality foam King and Queen mattress. Gigabit AT&T fiber internet on its own network segment for maximum security. Smart TV in living room and master bedroom. Automated key entry and instant booking. Smoking and seating area outside. Dogs ok, cats with $250 refundable deposit. Washer and dryer in unit for long term stays.

The space
Downtown Durham (5m) - Downtown Chapel Hill (7m) - Duke University (8m) - Veritas Collaborative (10min) - Duke Hospital (9min) - Research Triangle Park (13min) - - UNC Hospital/University (23m)

This unit is proudly an official QuantumSuite. Expect a higher level of service from a QuantumSuite as you would from a traditional hotel. Here’s why:

- Cleanliness: Our units are cleaned top to bottom for each new guest. This includes all kitchen appliances, floors, and dishes, along with new sheets. We sanitize and disinfect all touchable surfaces, remotes and switches. If you think something isn’t clean, tell us. We’ll clean it again!

- Book today for today? Check-in right away! Our staff are always ready for your booking inquiries and are available for instant booking. You do not need to hesitate to book with us for any of our units for the same day. We are available to chat with you and check you in 24/7.

- We use ultra high quality foam mattresses in all our units. The bed is the most important part of the stay because you spend most of your time in it.

- Bad backs are welcome! We get many compliments from guests after their stay about the mattresses we use. They are hand picked and provided in partnership with the Mattress Firm and are available at a discount to guests through an arrangement that we have with them, ask in chat. We welcome your sore back on our bed; we know that you will love them and get a great night's sleep!

- High Quality Sheets! What’s the point of having an awesome mattress without having soft, comfy sheets? Our units boast 100% Organic cotton cooling percale weave and soft breathable bed sheets and pillow cases. Lay down, slip into them and enjoy how fresh and comfortable they are.

- Fiber optic internet is always in all our units where available with Ethernet hand-offs for a direct, private connection up to 3GB: faster than WiFi! If you need additional Ethernet ports, we are happy to provide you with an ethernet switch free of charge, just ask us in chat.

- Samsung smartTVs in most units, with 100+ channels of TV Plus along with your popular streaming services.

- 24/7 Customer Service: Having any issue with your stay, want to make changes to your booking or need help? Customer service is available to you 24/7. Customer service inquiries are typically answered by the owner or a decision maker. We do not outsource or use robotic overseas workers to answer your chat. You are ALWAYS talking to a manager and we love to help.

- Self check-in always: You will receive a door code on the day of check-in to allow yourself in. Our door locks are mechanical and do not rely on electricity nor the internet to work. When you check-in, we are standing by through our smart doorbell in case you have any trouble.

- Neighborhood concierge: Want to know about local restaurants and points of interest from someone that has lived in the area for years? Need help finding a trustworthy realtor to find a new home in the area or long term rental? Our staff are happy to answer any questions you have about the area and love to help.

- All our units are entire homes. You are never sharing your space. The outside of our units are constantly monitored as all motion events are checked for anything out of the ordinary and all our units are well insured.

- Pet Friendly: We allow dogs and cats and have a cleaning process that removes all the hair for allergic guests.

- Light Blocking Shades in all Bedrooms: Enjoy sleeping in the dark!

listing_name: Walk to Duke Campus!  3 Bedroom in Trinity Park!
description:
Located on one of the most desirable streets in one of the most desirable neighborhoods in Durham, this listing is for the recently renovated downstairs 3 bedroom apartment.

There are three units in this building, all of which we rent on Airbnb.

Walk to Duke Campus, Whole Foods and downtown restaurants.

Original hardwood floors, new shaker kitchen cabinets, granite countertops, an in-unit washer/dryer, off street parking for two cars (in tandem), and spacious living room.

The space
This rental is the entire downstairs (Unit A) of a large triplex building and accessed via a private entrance up the front porch. The entire space is yours and no interior spaces are shared. There are two other upstairs 1 bedroom apartments that we also rent as short term/mid term rentals.

Once inside, the property opens to a living room with a couch and two chairs, coffee table and smart tv where you can access your streaming services. The living room also contains a large table with bench seating for meals and also a small office desk and chair to use as a work station. Off one side of the living room is the first of three bedrooms featuring a comfortable king sized bed.

Briefly continuing down a hallway off of the opposite side of the living room is a half bath, the second bedroom (queen bed) and the opening to the kitchen. Inside the kitchen you will find barstool seating at a breakfast bar, new stainless steel appliances and basic pots, pans, cutlery, etc.

The full bath (tub/shower combo) and laundry machines are located off of the kitchen as is the final third bedroom.

The bedrooms have closet space and privacy blackout curtains for a comfortable night's sleep.

Guest access
This rental is the entire downstairs (Unit A) of a large triplex building.

During the week, please park behind the building in the parking area accessed via the alleyway. You will see an area marked for Unit A and there you can pull up to two cars in (one behind another).
At night and on weekends, you can also park in front of the home on Minerva Avenue. If parking behind the home, simply walk down the side of the house until you find the FRONT steps, walk up the porch to access via the front door.

**If parking in front of the house, please be sure to follow all marked parking signs so you are not ticketed while school is in session.

The door uses the August Home smart lock and can be accessed by sending us your cellphone information prior to check in. Once you provide your cellphone and we add your number, you will receive a text message with additional instructions on how to download the app. Upon arrival to the front door, simply open the August Home app and press the circle to unlock the front door (the phone will sense the door lock via Bluetooth). We will also send you a unique pin pad code either as a backup or for primary use if you prefer not to download the door lock app.

In the event that technology fails, we have a backup lockbox hidden on site for emergency access.

description:
Lovely retreat in an amazing location, one of Durham's best neighborhoods, only six miles to UNC, six miles to Duke and 12 miles to RDU airport.

Three bedrooms and two full baths, with an amazing back yard and miles of walking paths through the safe wooded neighborhood, complete with playgrounds, playing fields, and restaurants and shops at both ends of the neighborhood. Very convenient to RTP, I-40 and Southpoint Mall.

Beyond the living room is the first floor bedroom, with an adjoining bathroom. Upstairs are two more bedrooms, one with a queen bed and one with a single daybed, and a full bathroom.

listing_name: Charming Classic Cottage 2Br
description:
This charming 2 bedroom bungalow in the historic Watts Hospital-Hillandale neighborhood is thoughtfully appointed to delight your senses and anticipate your needs - from am coffee to full home cooking! Relax in your cozy Bull City home base, knowing you are just minutes from the beating heart of Downtown Durham.
Convenient to NCSSM, Duke’s East Campus, the Ninth Street retail district, I-85 and 147.
High speed internet & smart TV.
Thank you for reading the full house rules before booking!

The space
This classic bungalow has been updated with modern systems while holding on to the retro features unique to its period. Thoughtfully decorated in an eclectic aesthetic, including artwork we’ve collected in our travels, the comfy appointments and warm colors make the home feel cozy.
Both bedrooms enjoy east facing windows to capture the rising sun. The larger bedroom includes a peaceful remote workspace. South facing windows bring all-day natural light into the living room and one bedroom. Built in bookcases and closets hold a variety of treasures, and also plenty of room for your own clothing and items.
Don’t let the retro fridge fool you - this stocked kitchen is prepared for anything you want to make, with a full gas range & oven, tea kettle, coffee maker and microwave. Plus, of course, the basic amenities for chopping, mixing and storing your meal. And plenty of wine glasses (Priorities!) The space has a separate dining room, where you and your group can enjoy relaxing meals. It can also serve as a remote workspace.
Relax in the comfy living room, where you can stream all your favorites on the Smart TV, play a board game or just cozy up with a good book! Feel free to browse our library of both books and games.
A washer & dryer are also available for your convenience.

We are Delighted Properties, because that is how we want you to feel when you walk in the door. The Bull City is our home and we want to share it with you, through personal recommendations and the items & services we provide throughout your space. Look for all the local products we include (and ask us where you can find them for yourself!)
We take great care in creating a comfortable, home-but-better experience for your stay - we hope you'll Be Delighted!

Guest access
You will have the entire home and yard to yourselves for the duration of the visit.
Watts Hospital-Hillandale is conveniently located and very walk-friendly, so you might not even need a car while you’re here! You'll be walking distance to coffee shops, restaurants, groceries and more.
Lyft/Uber/Scooters, etc are also prevalent around town.
If you do have your own vehicle, street parking in the neighborhood in free and plentiful.

Other things to note
Please note: Due to the ongoing pandemic, guests are expected to abide by CDC/WHO guidelines, as well as all North Carolina and Durham Covid-19 guidelines. Durham is currently under an indoor mask mandate. Many private restaurants and arts venues are requiring proof of vaccination to enter. Full up-to-date orders can be seen at ncdotgov.
We do ask that guests are relatively quiet after 9 PM, as a courtesy to neighbors. Parties and loud groups are not permitted. Thanks for helping us be good neighbors.
Smoking or vaping of any substances is not permitted on the property.
Pets are not permitted.
